attributes.description: Alerts when host max disk latency exceeds 15 ms. Storage pressure impacts all VMs on the host.
attributes.name: [vSphere OTel] Host disk latency high

investigation_guide.blob:
## vSphere host disk latency high

### What fired
`vcenter.host.disk.latency.max > 15 ms` during the window.

### Why it matters
Host-level disk latency affects every VM on the host. Usually points at storage array pressure or a bad path.

### Triage
1. Check per-LUN latency.
2. Inspect path health (multipathing).

### Remediation
- Rebalance storage / fix path.

### Tuning
- 15 ms threshold; 30 ms for tolerant workloads.
